toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me analyze all the legacy patterns and modernize the project.

Legacy patterns identified:
1. **Non-SDK-style project format** — uses `ToolsVersion`, XML namespace, explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`
2. **Explicit `Compile` includes** — SDK-style auto-globs `.cs` files
3. **Manual `AssemblyInfo.cs`** — SDK-style auto-generates assembly attributes
4. **Explicit framework references** (`System`, `System.Core`, etc.) — implicit in SDK-style


5. **Debug/Release configurations with hardcoded settings** — SDK-style provides sensible defaults
6. **Unnecessary legacy properties** like `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, and `WarningLevel` that are either redundant or already set to their defaults
7. **`TargetFrameworkVersion` v4.7.2** — needs to become `TargetFramework: net472` in SDK-style
8. **OutputPath formatting** — SDK-style handles this automatically

Now I'll modernize the project file and remove the `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` file since the SDK-style format generates those attributes automatically.

data.content:
Here's a summary of all legacy patterns identified and what was done:

| Legacy Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---|
| **Non-SDK `<Project>` with `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace** | Replaced with `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| **Explicit `Import` of `Microsoft.Common.props` / `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`** | Removed — implied by the SDK |
| **`TargetFrameworkVersion` v4.7.2** | Changed to `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| **`OutputType` Library** | Removed — `Library` is the SDK default |
| **Debug/Release PropertyGroups** (OutputPath, DebugType, Optimize, DefineConstants, etc.) | Removed — SDK provides identical defaults |
| **`ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`, `Configuration`, `Platform`, `ErrorReport`, `WarningLevel`** | Removed — all default or obsolete in SDK-style |
| **Explicit `<Reference>` for System.\* assemblies** | Removed — implicit with `net472` targeting |
| **Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items** | Removed — SDK auto-globs all `.cs` files |
| **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** | Deleted — metadata moved to `<PropertyGroup>` (SDK auto-generates assembly attributes) |

The project went from **47 lines → 16 lines** with identical build semantics.
